# Sync §neo_claude_opus ModelStats row to registry truth (active since #12415)

## Context

Found during #12922's V-B-A (2026-06-11) and flagged unclaimed in my `[lane-claim]` broadcast (`MESSAGE:e8245550`, 21:18Z): `learn/agentos/ModelStats.md` still lists `@neo-opus-grace` under `§pending_swarm_identities` with `participationStatus: temporarily_unreachable`, although the registry (`ai/graph/identityRoots.mjs`) has carried the uniform active-shape for her since PR `#12415` merged on 2026-06-03 (ticket `#12413`). Nine days of registry-vs-doc drift on the identity substrate's capability registry. Self-selected per the post-review-pickup cycle at the 2026-06-11 ~22:49Z heartbeat (all my declared gates verified unmoved; no competing claim).

`Release classification:` boardless — substrate-doc hygiene, not v13-release-blocking.

## The Problem

ModelStats.md is the per-identity capability/provenance registry (ADR 0012 §2.5) that identity nodes reference as `modelVersionSource`. The `§neo_claude_opus` row (under `§pending_swarm_identities`) asserts three stale facts: `participationStatus: temporarily_unreachable`, `name: Neo Claude Opus` (her Social Name **Grace** landed via the `#11240` round / `#12910`), and `swarmRole: "Pending Claude-family generalist… no active routing, quorum participation, or review coverage until activation"` — all three contradicted by the registry at HEAD (`74580bb77`), where the node reads `participationStatus: 'active'` (4× null), `name: 'Grace'`, `swarmRole: 'Active Claude-family generalist…'`. The drift class is exactly what `#12415` fixed in the registry and `#12922` fixed for `@neo-fable-clio` in this same doc — the claude-opus ModelStats half was simply never done.

## The Architectural Reality

- `learn/agentos/ModelStats.md`: active rows live under `§active_swarm_identities` (ada, vega, fable, fable-clio, gemini, gpt); `§neo_claude_opus` sits in `§pending_swarm_identities` (after `#12922` removed my row, hers is the section's only remaining entry — the section header text stays, correctly describing any future pending identities).
- Registry order precedent (`#12922`): rows are placed matching `identityRoots.mjs` order — claude-opus belongs after `§neo_opus` (Ada's section).
- Row-update shape precedent: the `§neo_fable_clio` active row (name line with Social Name + assent provenance; status line with flip evidence; Active-prefixed swarmRole) — landed via `#12922`, reviewed cross-family.
- `§update_history` convention: one dated row per change with ticket ref.

## The Fix

All in `learn/agentos/ModelStats.md`, additive/move-only:
1. Relocate `§neo_claude_opus` from `§pending_swarm_identities` to `§active_swarm_identities`, after `§neo_opus` (registry order).
2. Sync the drifted lines to registry truth at HEAD: `name` → carries Social Name **Grace** (`#11240` round); `participationStatus` → `active` (flipped via `#12413`/PR `#12415`, 2026-06-03; doc sync via this ticket); `swarmRole` → the registry's Active-form text; the trailing "reserved for activation / re-verify on activation" paragraph → activated form (capability values were verified at activation per `#12415`).
3. `§update_history` row recording the drift-fix with both anchors.
4. No capability-value changes (they already match the registry: Opus 4.8, 2026-05-28, $5/$25, 1M).

## Contract Ledger Matrix

| Target Surface | Source of Authority | Proposed Behavior | Fallback / Edge | Docs | Evidence |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| ModelStats `§neo_claude_opus` row | `ai/graph/identityRoots.mjs` at HEAD (the SSOT this doc mirrors) + ADR 0012 §2.5 update discipline | Row relocated + 3 drifted lines synced to registry values | n/a — doc mirrors registry; reversible 1 commit | The row IS the doc | L2: diff review against the registry node, line by line |

## Decision Record impact

`aligned-with` ADR 0012 (update discipline: no capability dimension changes → no ADR amendment).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `§neo_claude_opus` sits under `§active_swarm_identities` after `§neo_opus`; `§pending_swarm_identities` retains its header (empty of entries).
- [ ] `name` / `participationStatus` / `swarmRole` / activation-note lines match `identityRoots.mjs` at HEAD.
- [ ] `§update_history` row added; no other rows or capability values touched.
- [ ] Markdown renders correctly.

## Out of Scope

- Any registry (`identityRoots.mjs`) change — the registry is already correct; this is doc-side only.
- Other identities' rows (all verified current as of `#12922`).
- Grace's GitHub profile surfaces (bearer/operator-side, done per the `#11240` landing).

## Related

- Registry flip this mirrors: #12413 / PR `#12415`.
- Same-doc precedent for the row shape + relocation: #12922 / PR `#12923`.
- Social Name source: `#11240` / landing `#12910`.
